res.title: Researches & Cooperation
res.subtitle: Go
res.intro_desc: At BOX group, we engineer the boundaries of soft matter. Dedicated to the innovation of advanced functional polymers, our core philosophy is rooted in interfacial engineering. By seamlessly integrating synthetic polymer chemistry with precise interfacial design, we manipulate the dynamic interactions at the microscopic level to dictate macroscopic performance. Our goal is to translate these resilient and intelligent interfacial architectures into scalable material solutions for emerging challenges in flexible electronics, robotic sensing, and sustainable technologies.

join.intro_desc: A student is not necessarily inferior to his teacher, nor is a teacher necessarily more virtuous and talented than his student (弟子不必不如师，师不必贤于弟子).
